title: Prepare agriculture training review
summary: Confirm that Nexus may prepare a review-only agriculture training next step.
riskDisclosure: This only prepares review material. No enrollment, message, payment, or provider contact occurs.
evidenceRequirement: Use a verified training source packet before showing source-backed claims.
sourcePacketRequirement: Required for source-backed agriculture training guidance.
userFacingLanguage: No action has been taken. I can prepare training options for you to review.
safeUseNotes: Approval intent is separate from enrollment or provider contact.
limitations: Fixture-only confirmation. It cannot enroll the user or contact a training provider.

title: Prepare irrigation learning review
summary: Confirm that Nexus may prepare review-only irrigation learning guidance.
riskDisclosure: This prepares education-oriented guidance only. No equipment action or site-specific engineering step occurs.
evidenceRequirement: Use a local or verified irrigation education source packet.
userFacingLanguage: No action has been taken. I can prepare irrigation learning guidance for review.
limitations: Fixture-only confirmation. It is not site-specific engineering advice.

title: Prepare farm jobs review
summary: Confirm that Nexus may prepare a review-only farm jobs pathway summary.
riskDisclosure: This only prepares a review step. No job application, employer contact, account change, or message occurs.
evidenceRequirement: Use a verified workforce or training source packet before making opportunity claims.
userFacingLanguage: No action has been taken. I can prepare farm job pathways for review.
safeUseNotes: Approval intent is not a job application.
limitations: Fixture-only confirmation. It cannot apply for a job or contact an employer.

title: Prepare AgriTrade browse review
summary: Confirm that Nexus may prepare a review-only AgriTrade browsing step.
riskDisclosure: This only prepares marketplace browsing context. No buy, sell, payment, message, order, or listing action occurs.
evidenceRequirement: Use local marketplace module context only; no live buyer or seller claims.
userFacingLanguage: No action has been taken. I can prepare AgriTrade browse options for review.
safeUseNotes: Approval intent is not a marketplace transaction.
limitations: Fixture-only confirmation. It cannot create listings, contact buyers, or process payment.

title: Blocked call confirmation attempt
summary: Record that call execution remains blocked and would require future approval, provider, audit, and final execution gates.
riskDisclosure: Calling is high-risk communication behavior. Nexus cannot call, message, open WhatsApp, open Telegram, or trigger a phone provider from this confirmation.
evidenceRequirement: Resolved recipient, visible provider, explicit approval, audit coverage, and final execution gate would be required later.
sourcePacketRequirement: Not source-backed guidance; this is a high-risk communication boundary note.
userFacingLanguage: No call has been placed. I can only explain what would be required before any future call.
safeUseNotes: Vague confirmations such as okay must not authorize calls.
limitations: Fixture-only confirmation. It cannot call, message, or open a provider.

title: Blocked payment confirmation attempt
summary: Record that payment execution remains blocked and would require future consent, provider, compliance, audit, and final execution gates.
riskDisclosure: Payment is high-risk transaction behavior. Nexus cannot pay, buy, sell, check out, or move money from this confirmation.
evidenceRequirement: Verified merchant, amount, consent, payment provider, compliance gate, audit coverage, and final execution gate would be required later.
sourcePacketRequirement: Not source-backed guidance; this is a high-risk payment boundary note.
userFacingLanguage: No payment has been made. I can only explain what would be required before any future payment.
safeUseNotes: Approval intent is not a payment authorization.
limitations: Fixture-only confirmation. It cannot buy, sell, check out, or process payments.
